content: Is castor,jenkin, Ryker,ogier a good team
Wheels are a mess but the line up is fine

I would like to mantain the brothers but at least Pollux
<@1122140615770120275> Make sure to run “Frenzy” “Gluttony” and “Emerge” Brown/R Wheels, as they are really strong for storymode, Chapter 1-9.
I was thinking in replacing Ramona, I really don’t like the combo of her and Hameln even tho it pays well. But I’ll see
If your cores are Pollux and Castor, then you’re other two slots can flex nearly anything.
Glad to hear, I feel this game progress really fast or maybe I spend a lot of time today. It’s my first day on this gacha and having characters at lv30 and both of the banners feels weird 😂
Yeah happens. It starts off pretty fast but walls can be…well walls

This game is quite generous with it’s pulls compared to others. If you feel as going to fast is a bad thing, then slowing down and understanding your Awakener’s Kits, giving them a gander, could be worthwhile. Other then that, you can keep going forward! <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>
I’ve read this game mostly has skill walls instead of pay walls… if that’s is true I’d be happy to be stressed
Definite literacy walls(that most players get stuck at)

I mean...first stage is alright, but second....8 stacks of serpents, 90% dmg reduction and 550 dmg every single turn...and after you manage to beat it, you get the third stage with 1100 dmg? <:flop1:1356083604236800030>
I coached a Salvador Pickman player to beat this. If they can, you can too with Aequor Tawil <:point:1356053112292511815>

Yeah I put the story aside for some time and went to the challenges to practice. Story is intriguing but I want to feel that I know what I’m doing, ofc that never happens in a day. At least that my experience with other games. Know the mechanics but not the characters so. But overall I’m happy with the game. I grow tired of the fan service gachas with 0-no cool male characters that’s why I went crazy for the banners here lol
They were hella underlevel, and under skill lvled, and weird WoDs, and I didnt use any Brown/R Wheels when coaching them. They still won, so you definitely can win. <:point:1356053112292511815>

I have no way of getting the serpent in the back without Goliath ult (some counters as well).
So I'm stuck there for quite a while, tanking 500 dmg per turn <:dead:1356082627509092372>
3 Tawil ults in a row I got 0 cards with aoe dmg <:dead:1356082627509092372>

I'll still restart to try, I'm greedy for gnosis, but welp...somewhat clueless. This team has no way of dealing AOE Dmg without Goliath's ult, Murphy's 3 cost (doesn't do much) and Tawil's exalt cards, which is rng and it's not like I can exalt every single turn, since there are 8 serpents

I’m sure you’ll progress smoothly with the knowledge to adapt to what the game throws at you, because you actively seek information and understanding of underlying mechanics and synergies that most players lack. Most players want to be handheld and spoonfed, lacking the desire to understand, therefore unable to improve, hitting a wall. 

It’s good that you enjoy Morimens, as so do I! 

This game also had a number of male characters issue, but the community communicated with Devs, and they started releasing back to back, male Awakeners. Pollux being the most recent one~
Glad to hear. Also a very welcoming community, this game is amazing. I’ll leave this chat alone for what is meant to haha. Thank you all so much <:pray:1356053116260454534>

I think the Miryam fight in Chapter 5 really wants AOE, or is a cakewalk with Nautila and Caecus. Other then that, if you dont have AOE, or counter, you need to try your best to play smart. Focus on surviving mainly, and looking for AOE burst turns with Tawil Exalt AOE card/Goliath Exalt. This fight rewards you for playing defensive more then full damage. Then the last form, you need to burst or play Chapter Gimmick card into Gg. Iirc the Chapter Gimmick Tent Attack is AOE on Posse(maybe that helps). <:idk:1356084138280489080> Cheering for ya~ <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149> <:pray:1356053116260454534>
Had to use all my brain power
<@510949582499217411> You manage to beat it, yes?
She clearly wasn't designed for my team <:dead:1356082627509092372>
Her design is for defensive/Counter comps.
I always have more troubles with normal/elite stages than with bosses because I have barely any way of dealing aoe dmg. And here's the boss with 90% dmg red and 8 serpents 1400 hp each
Hey, at least you beat it with ya comp! So it works~
No achievement or stars that say otherwise
Are there any good guides about team building? I'd like to have 5 teams that I can use for D-Effect.

Dont exist. If you want to build teams yourself, focus on a:

Archetype: Counter/Poison/Str Stack

Mechanic: Tentacles/Crimsum Furnace/Ultra Turn

Realm: Chaos/Caro

Awakener: Castor/Kathigua/Corposant
Other then that, send a screenshot of all your Awakeners and ask people in this server.
I actually have most of the Awakeners, or at least the meta ones.

An screenshot would help the most if you want 5 teams for D-Tide~

I'll try and post one later. Thanks!

Sounds good~
If I can’t help, I’m sure someone can come along to help ya!

should i replace Tulu with Murphy?
I forgot I had two of the free unit things, who would be best for me to grab and what sorta teams can I put together? Or is there any reason for me to just hold em and wait for now
If you are struggling to survive, then Murphy is a defensive option to Tulu.

I suggest to hold off on them unless you need a specific Awakener for your teams, or you want a specific Awakener’s Enlightenment. Other uses are if you dont see youself pulling on a specific Standard Realm Banner but want one specific Awakener, then you can select them.

Generally good Awakeners are:
Chaos: Nautila
Aequor: Goliath/Caecus

Mono Aequor: Corposant/Miryam(Murphy)/Goliath/Tulu

This team normally wants Clem, but she is used. Corposant wants E3 as well for Weakness on 2 cost(E2) and Vulnerable on Exalt(E3).

Corpo wants invest in her whole team with her, so she definitely eats more as a team then Kath.

Could Erika/daffodil/celeste/tinct potentially be a good team for arc two?
Figured it be good due to the strength buffs that tinct and Erika give
Do they give permanent STR? I thought it was all temporary

You're more likely to build a lot of strength with the relics you pick up than with Tinct and Erica, and it'll be permanent, *and* a lot of the best relics for stacking that sort of thing are reliant on rousing repeatedly, which you aren't going to be able to do with Erica as your silver key gen
So who would be good for daffodil then?
really makes me understand I only know the popular picks, I don't know a lot about Daffodil...

Nautila and Daffodil are big in the counter cheese comp
although it's not as good in Arc 2 because of the health restriction...

Winkle or Jenkin and *maybe* Casiah would be nice to pick up at some point - Winkle's just good in general, Jenkin's ultimate buffs everyone's crit damage, not just her own, and Casiah can TK Daffodil's Skull Reaver
Looove this team, hate Miryam in it (prolly because of lack of E2) ; anyone know an alternative?

basically any blue character works with the other blue characters, so it really depends on what you have; if you're willing to dilute the realm mastery, you could do Winkle as an alternative aliemus generator, or play Karen to more reliably use both of Tulu's big skill cards

I'm going to try to do the first two waves of DTide, any tips for starting out with team building? I know getting Vulnerable on the enemy is important.. is it good to try to mix in chaos characters with my teams to try to get the realm legacy effect?
Tawil, caecus, nautila and ramona is a good bluewill team
Celeste, goliath uh and other blue characters can work for other team
Getting multiple realms will dilute the effect that the realm has on you, but this only really matters if you are - for whatever reason - relying heavily on passive tentacle damage or ultra turns

~~since realm mastery isn't ever really something you ever have enough of to make a significant difference...~~ the only thing that jumps out for really general building advice is that you want to aim to have one silver key character per team, so even if they're not in stellar shape, it might be worth bringing Ramona or Aigis
